title: feat(gateway): implement token bucket rate limiting
body:
## Summary

Implements token bucket rate limiting as discussed in #42.

## Changes

- Added `RateLimiter` middleware in `internal/middleware/ratelimit.go`
- Configurable per-tier limits via env vars
- 429 responses include `Retry-After` header
- Prometheus metrics for rate limit hits

## Test Plan

- [x] Unit tests for token bucket algorithm
- [x] Integration tests for middleware
- [ ] Load test verification
